ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the customer (male/female) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the customer in kg */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index of the customer */,
  "hereditary_diseases" TEXT /* List of hereditary diseases if any */,
  "no_of_dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents the customer has */,
  "smoker" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is a smoker */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  "bloodpressure" INTEGER /* Blood pressure reading of the customer */,
  "diabetes" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has diabetes */,
  "regular_ex" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has regular exercise habits */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer (single, married, divorced, etc.) */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the customer (high school, college, university, etc.) */,
  "occupation_category" TEXT /* Occupation category of the customer (office worker, manual labor, etc.) */,
  "daily_activity_level" TEXT /* Daily activity level of the customer (sedentary, lightly active, etc.) */,
  "diet_type" TEXT /* Diet type of the customer (vegetarian, non-vegetarian, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the claim */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount claimed by the customer */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was made */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., approved, denied, pending) */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g., hospitalization, medication, etc.) */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid to the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, check, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_payments_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_medical_history" (
  "medical_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "medical_condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the customer */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment received by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medical_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_medical_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_lifestyle" (
  "lifestyle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the customer */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption of the customer */,
  "exercise_frequency" TEXT /* Exercise frequency of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifestyle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_lifestyle_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
